text_block_list.name: Super Creek
choice_data_list: Morning! How was your day off?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You seem pretty energetic yourself. Hehe, you
must have got some good rest too.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Your peppy greeting and perky smile are raising
my mood even more!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Let's not push ourselves too hard and go at our
own pace today. And, as always, let's give it our
all! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek is light on her feet and looks well
rested.
